data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a visual timezone converter.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that the system provides a visual timezone converter, but the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case describes a scenario involving timezones but lacks concrete evidence demonstrating that the requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation process is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of a visual timezone converter.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the visual timezone converter functionality.
